'''Turcan III''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Turcan system/Legends|Turcan system]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. It was the headquarters of the mercenary company known as [[Churhee's Riflemen]].
